pageInfo.pagePurpose: To create a new customer record by entering their primary contact information, company details, billing and shipping addresses, and other financial or custom data.

businessEntities.name: Customer
evidence: Allow portal access for this customer

clickableElements.label: Navigate To (Opt+0)
clickableElements.businessIntent: To open a quick navigation menu or search bar.
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: A search input or a list of navigation targets appears, allowing the user to quickly jump to another page.

clickableElements.label: Items
clickableElements.businessIntent: To expand the 'Items' section of the main navigation menu.
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: A dropdown or sub-menu appears showing links related to 'Items' and 'Price Lists'.

clickableElements.label: Inventory
clickableElements.businessIntent: To expand the 'Inventory' section of the main navigation menu.
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: A dropdown or sub-menu appears showing links related to 'Inventory Adjustments'.

clickableElements.label: Sales
clickableElements.businessIntent: To expand the 'Sales' section of the main navigation menu.
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: A dropdown or sub-menu appears showing links like 'Customers', 'Quotes', 'Invoices', etc.

clickableElements.businessIntent: To display the form section for 'Other Details' like PAN, Currency, and Opening Balance.
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: The UI scrolls to or displays the 'Other Details' section of the customer creation form.

clickableElements.label: Address
clickableElements.businessIntent: To display the form section for customer addresses.
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: The UI scrolls to or displays the 'Billing Address' and 'Shipping Address' sections of the form.

clickableElements.label: Contact Persons
clickableElements.businessIntent: To display the section for adding and managing contact persons.
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: The UI scrolls to or displays the table for adding contact persons.

clickableElements.label: Custom Fields
clickableElements.businessIntent: To display the form section for custom fields related to the customer.
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: The UI scrolls to or displays the custom fields section.

clickableElements.label: Reporting Tags

clickableElements.expectedOutcome: The UI scrolls to or displays the reporting tags section.

clickableElements.label: Remarks

clickableElements.label: Learn More
clickableElements.businessIntent: To get more information about the 'Customer Owner' feature.
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: A help tooltip, modal, or new documentation page is displayed explaining what a Customer Owner is.
evidence: Customer Owner: Assign a user as the customer owner to provide access only to the data of this customer.

clickableElements.label: Copy billing address
clickableElements.businessIntent: To streamline data entry by duplicating the billing address into the shipping address fields.
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: The values from the 'Billing Address' fields are copied into the corresponding 'Shipping Address' fields.

clickableElements.label: Add Contact Person
clickableElements.businessIntent: To add a new contact person associated with this customer.
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: A new editable row is added to the contact persons table.

clickableElements.label: Save
clickableElements.businessIntent: To submit the form and create a new customer record.
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: The form data is submitted, a new customer is created in the system, and the user is likely redirected to the customer's detail page or the main customer list.

clickableElements.label: Cancel
clickableElements.businessIntent: To discard the entered information and abort the customer creation process.
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: The form is cleared and the user is returned to the previous page, likely the main customer list.

tables.purpose: To list and manage individual contact people associated with the customer being created.

columns.name: Salutation
columns.meaning: The title for the contact person (e.g., Mr., Ms., Dr.).
columns.businessPurpose: To address the contact person formally.

columns.name: First Name
columns.meaning: The first name of the contact person.

columns.name: Last Name
columns.meaning: The last name of the contact person.

columns.name: Email Address
columns.meaning: The email address of the contact person.
columns.businessPurpose: To communicate with the contact person electronically.

columns.name: Work Phone
columns.meaning: The work phone number of the contact person.
columns.businessPurpose: To contact the person at their place of work.

columns.name: Mobile
columns.meaning: The mobile phone number of the contact person.

columns.name: delete
columns.meaning: An action to remove the contact person row.
columns.businessPurpose: To remove an incorrectly added or obsolete contact person from the customer record.

forms.purpose: To capture all the necessary details for creating a new customer record.

fields.businessMeaning: Specifies whether the customer is a Business or an Individual.
The title (e.g., Mr., Ms.) for the primary contact person.
The first name of the main contact person for this customer.
The last name of the main contact person for this customer.
The legal name of the customer's company.
The name to be displayed for the customer throughout the application.
The primary email address for the customer.
The primary work phone number for the customer.
The primary mobile phone number for the customer.
The customer's Permanent Account Number (PAN), a tax identification number.
The outstanding amount owed by the customer at the time of their creation in the system.
A flag to grant the customer access to a client portal.
An attachment field to upload related documents for the customer.
The name of the person or department the billing address is directed to.
The street address for billing purposes.
The city for the billing address.
The state for the billing address.
The postal code for the billing address.
The phone number associated with the billing address.
The fax number associated with the billing address.
The name of the person or department the shipping address is directed to.
The street address for shipping purposes.
The city for the shipping address.
The state for the shipping address.
The postal code for the shipping address.
The phone number associated with the shipping address.
The fax number associated with the shipping address.
Internal notes or comments about the customer, not visible to them.

workflows.name: Create a New Customer
steps: User fills in the customer's details in the 'New Customer' form, including primary contact, company name, and addresses.
User optionally adds one or more contact persons using the 'Add Contact Person' button and table.
User clicks the 'Save' button to create the customer record.

workflows.name: Cancel Customer Creation
steps: User starts filling in the 'New Customer' form.
User decides not to proceed and clicks the 'Cancel' button.
The application discards the entered data and returns the user to the previous screen.

workflows.name: Prefill Customer Data from GST Portal
steps: User enters the customer's GSTIN into a prompt.
The system fetches data from the GST portal and populates the relevant fields in the form.
evidence: Prefill Customer details from the GST portal using the Customer's GSTIN.

userGoals.goal: Onboard a new customer into the system
evidence: The primary action buttons are 'Save' and 'Cancel'.

userGoals.goal: Capture comprehensive details for a customer
evidence: The form includes sections for 'Primary Contact', 'Company Name', 'Address', 'Contact Persons', and 'Other Details' like 'Opening Balance' and 'PAN'.
A 'Copy billing address' button is provided to avoid re-typing the same address for shipping.

userGoals.goal: Associate multiple contact points with a single customer
evidence: The page includes a table and an 'Add Contact Person' button to manage a list of contacts for the customer.

predictedMissingUI.reason: After clicking 'Save', the user needs feedback on whether the customer was created successfully or if there was an error.
Fields like 'Email Address' or 'Company Name' are likely required and should show an error if left blank or formatted incorrectly.
The 'Prefill' link implies that clicking it will reveal a modal or an input field to enter the GSTIN.
Clicking 'Cancel' after entering data typically prompts the user with an 'Are you sure?' dialog to prevent accidental data loss.

pageNarrative: This page is a comprehensive form for creating a new customer. A user can specify if the customer is a business or individual, and enter primary contact, company, and financial details like opening balance and PAN. The interface provides distinct sections for billing and shipping addresses, with a convenience feature to copy the billing address to shipping. Users can also associate multiple contact persons with the customer via a dedicated table. Once all the necessary information is entered, the user can save the record to create the new customer or cancel the operation to discard the changes.
